title: Ian's Mint GUI
description: A resource pack that changes most GUI like the hotbar/inventory and more to a green mint color.
body:
### **Join Discord Server to recommend changes or fix bugs!**



# **Ian’s Mint GUI**

Ian’s Mint GUI is a work-in-progress Minecraft resource pack that refreshes the game’s interface with a clean, mint-themed aesthetic. It replaces most major GUI elements with soft, cool colors to create a calm, modern, and visually cohesive experience across menus, inventories, and HUD components. The goal is to enhance clarity and readability while keeping Minecraft’s familiar layout intact.

# **Features**

- Mint-themed GUI redesign across many core screens
  
- Updated hotbar, inventory, crafting, container menus, and HUD elements
  
- Soft shading and gentle contrasts for clear visibility in all environments
  
- Minimalist style that keeps the interface clean without feeling empty
  
- Consistent look and feel that ties all redesigned elements together
  
# **Work-in-Progress Status**

This pack is actively being expanded. Additional menus, icons, and interface elements will be added over time as development continues. Although not every GUI component has been updated yet, the existing redesign already provides a polished and refreshing upgrade to the standard visuals.

# **Who This Pack Is For**

Ian. 

OR

Players seeking a calm, modern, and clean interface without drastically changing Minecraft’s core identity will find Ian’s Mint GUI to be a fitting and stylish enhancement.
